chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَمِيرِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/310)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/310)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ وُلِدَتْ فَاطِمَةُ بِنْتُ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بَعْدَ مَبْعَثِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ بِخَمْسِ سِنِينَ وَ تُوُفِّيَتْ وَ لَهَا ثَمَانَ عَشْرَةَ سَنَةً وَ خَمْسَةٌ وَ سَبْعُونَ يَوْماً .

en.hubeali: Abdullah Bin Ja’far and Sa’d Bin Abdullah, altogether from Ibrahim Bin Mahziyar, from his father Ali Bin Mahziyar, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Hisham Bin Salim, from Habeeb Al Sijistany who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was blessed with daughter (Syeda) Fatima<sup>asws</sup> after the Message of Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> by five years, and she<sup>asws</sup> passed away, and for her were eighteen years and seventy five days’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from in a marfu‘ manner from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “When Amir al-Mu’minin Ali (a.s.) was washed for burial they called from the side of the house, “If you would lift up the front of the coffin you would not need to lift up the back of the coffin and if you would lift up the back side then you would not need to lift up the front side.”
